name: Katherine Hepburn's Brownies
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 325°F. Butter and flour an 8-inch square baking pan. Melt the chocolate with the butter in a saucepan over low heat. Remove from the heat and stir in the sugar. Stir in the eggs and vanilla and mix until smooth. Add the flour, salt, and nuts and stir until smooth. Pour into the prepared pan. Bake about 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
